title: APT Design System Lint Checklist

sections.title: Tokens and Visual Contract
must: Use semantic tokens for color and surface classes.
never: Use raw color utilities when tokenized equivalents exist.
Hard-code ad hoc visual values that bypass token contracts.

sections.title: Component Contract
must: Use AptButton, AptCard, HeroCard, and AptTag for user-facing patterns when applicable.
Keep component variants semantic and doctrine-aligned.
never: Replace shared primitives with one-off lookalikes without documented intent.

sections.title: Layout Baseline
must: Keep clear content hierarchy and section rhythm.
never: Introduce layout changes that conflict with design architecture without a logged decision.

sections.title: Content and Docs Integrity
must: Treat apps/web/docs/design as source of truth for doctrine.
Update review and handoff assets when doctrine changes.
Update versioned docs and metadata for structural standards changes.
never: Treat generated apps/web/public/docs content as authored source.

sections.title: AI and Enforcement Layers
never: Generate instructions that conflict with the enforcement contracts.

quickChecks: Validate token usage for new styles.
Validate no new raw color utility classes.
